---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

.center[.size65[
Design a Poster for Fusion Day
]]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2024)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. [Compass Center Resources](https://www.drury.edu/academic-affairs/fusion-day/compass-center-fusion-day-resources/)




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.center[.content-box-green[.size45[**Assignment 3: Fusion Day Poster**]]]

```{r, echo = FALSE, fig.align = 'center', out.width = '58%'}
knitr::include_graphics("libs/Images/11_1-FD22 wide shot.jpg")
```

.center[.content-box-green[.size45[**Getting Feedback from our Community**]]]

???

Design a poster for Fusion Day that introduces your problem to the community and offers a test run of different solutions. 

- Your job is to present this poster during Fusion Day in order to collect community feedback on your problem framing (and proposed solution)



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.center[.content-box-green[.size45[**Assignment 3: Fusion Day Poster**]]]

.size40[
1. Argument: We have a serious, local environmental problem

2. Present four policy options to address this problem
    - Option 1: A C&C regulation that...
    - Option 2: A "green" tax that...
    - Option 3: A "green" subsidy that...
    - Option 4: An adaptive governance approach that...  
]

???

Here's what I'd like your poster to include.

- A well supported argument, and

- A series of options you are inviting the community to weigh-in on.

<br>

### Questions on the components here?

<br>

**SLIDE**: Let's step through some advice from the Compass Center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center1.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center2.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center3.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center4.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center5.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center6.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center7.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center8.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center9.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center10.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center11.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center12.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center13.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center14.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center15.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/11_1-Compass_Center16.png')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center


---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest_v3.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.center[.content-box-green[.size45[**Assignment 3: Fusion Day Poster**]]]

.size40[
1. Argument: We have a serious, local environmental problem

2. Present four policy options to address this problem
    - Option 1: A C&C regulation that...
    - Option 2: A "green" tax that...
    - Option 3: A "green" subsidy that...
    - Option 4: An adaptive governance approach that...  
]

???

Let's aim to share your progress in class on Thursday!

- Get and give some feedback!
